title: Andamaina Jeevitham
desc: Jomon lives a carefree life until a financial crisis forces him to confront reality, reshaping his bond with his father and pushing him towards growth and purpose.

title: Bujjigaadu: Made in Chennai
desc: Bujji moves to Chennai for 12 years to stay away from his best friend Chitti, with the promise that she will marry him. When they finally reunite, Bujji is a thug with a mission on his hands.

title: Lokah Chapter 1: Chandra
desc: A youthful woman uncovers mystical skills while facing personal hurdles. Meanwhile, as evil surfaces, she must embrace her powers and fate in a shifting world.

title: Oh Baby...
desc: Savitri, a 70-year-old woman who is unhappy with her life, accuses God of her problems. When she gets her photograph clicked at a studio, she is transformed into a beautiful 24-year-old girl.

title: Atharintiki Daaredi
desc: Goutham resolves to reunite his grandfather with Sunanda, his estranged aunt. However, he chooses to pose as a driver to befriend her.

title: Su From So
desc: In the coastal village of Marlur, Ashoka's innocent crush sparks rumours of ghostly possession, creating comedic chaos and unexpected twists.

title: Arjun
desc: Arjun's twin sister, Meenakshi, marries Uday, her love, against his parents' wishes who decide to kill her in retaliation to the wedding. However, Arjun tries to save his sister from their wrath.

title: Krishna Babu
desc: Krishna, a village arbitrator, is respected by all. He falls in love with Rama, the headmaster's daughter, but their relationship is strained due to Krishna's dark past.

title: Dhurandar
desc: The presenter discusses the film 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' in terms of its OTT and television release and also talks about its teaser.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A fun compilation of back-to-back hilarious Telugu movie scenes, bringing nonstop laughter with the funniest moments, comic sequences, and iconic reactions.

title: Bhoomi
desc: After his daughter is brutally raped and the attackers are acquitted, a father decides to take revenge and bring the perpetrators to justice.

title: Kotha Bangaru Lokam
desc: Swapna, who belongs to a wealthy family, falls in love with Balu, a middle-class boy. Problems ensue when Swapna's father learns about their relationship.

title: Skanda: The Attacker
desc: After Rayudu and Ranjith Reddy's children elope, the CMs turn against each other. However, when a college student kidnaps Reddy's daughter, a revenge saga unravels.

title: Bhale Bhale Magadivoy
desc: Lucky, an amnesiac scientist, is in love with Nandana, who is unaware of his condition. Things take a turn when he has to convince her parents for their marriage.

title: Tillu Square
desc: After a year of getting involved in a murder case due to a love affair, an unlucky disc jockey goes through a dirtier commotion that is related to his past.

title: Pokiri
desc: Krishna, a police officer, disguises himself as a thug and joins the mafia in order to wipe out the underworld. Meanwhile, he falls in love with Shruti, an aerobics teacher.
